zh.lifeSummary: 當Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw於1310年出生在波蘭馬左維次吉索查阿傑福索查阿傑福時，她的父親Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk26歲，母親Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia17歲。她於大約1324年8月19日之前與Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1374年1月11日在波蘭盧貝爾斯吉札莫斯吉格拉波維希享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw于1310年出生在波兰馬左維次吉索查阿傑福索查阿傑福时，她的父亲Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk26岁，母亲Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia17岁。她于大约1324年8月19日之前与Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1374年1月11日在波兰盧貝爾斯吉札莫斯吉格拉波維希享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Euphemia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a Late Greek name derived from eu ‘well, good’ + phēnai ‘to speak’. This was the name of various early saints, notably a virgin martyr said to have been burned at the stake at Chalcedon in 307 . It had a limited popularity in some regions in the 16th and 17th centuries and returned to favour in the Victorian period, especially in the pet form Effie . It is little used at present.

en.lifeSummary: When Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw was born in 1310, in Sochaczew, Sochaczew, Masovia, Poland, her father, Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk, was 26 and her mother, Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia, was 17. She married Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn before about 19 August 1324. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 11 January 1374, in Cieszyn, Grabowiec, Zamość, Lublin, Poland, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw est née en 1310, à Sochaczew, Sochaczew, mazowieckie, Pologne, son père, Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn avant environ 19 août 1324. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 janvier 1374, à Cieszyn, Grabowiec, Zamojski, lubelskie, Pologne, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw 1310 in Sochaczew, Sochaczew, Masowien, Polen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk 26 und ihre Mutter Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia 17. Sie hat vor um 19. August 1324 Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Januar 1374 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Cieszyn, Grabowiec, Zamojski, lubelskie, Polen.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw è nata il nel 1310 nel Sochaczew, Sochaczew, mazowieckie, Polonia, sua padre, Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn prima del circa 19 agosto 1324. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 11 gennaio 1374, nel Cieszyn, Grabowiec, Zamojski, lubelskie, Polonia, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsawが1310年にポーランドマゾウィエクイソチャクズエウソチャクズエウで生まれた時，父Trojden I Piast Duke of Czerskは26歳，母Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galiciaは17歳であった。約1324年8月19日以前にDuke Casimir I of Cieszynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1374年1月11日にポーランドルベルスキザモジスキグラボウィエックシエスズインで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw(이)가 1310년 폴란드 마즈위키 소차치w 소차치w에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1324년 8월 19일 이전 Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1374년 1월 11일 폴란드 루벨스키 자모j스키 그라보위크 시스즈이에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw nasceu em 1310, em Sochaczew, Sochaczew, mazowieckie, Polônia, seu pai, Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn antes aproximadamente 19 de agosto de 1324. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de janeiro de 1374, em Cieszyn, Grabowiec, Zamojski, lubelskie, Polônia, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw родилась в 1310 г. в местности сочакзю, сочакзю, мазоуиекки, Польша, её отцу по имени Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn перед около 19 августа 1324 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 11 января 1374 г. в местности сиесзин, грабоуиек, Замостський, Люблінське, Польша в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw nació en 1310, en Sochaczew, Sochaczew, mazowieckie, Polonia, su papá, Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn antes de aproximadamente 19 de agosto de 1324. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 11 de enero de 1374, en Cieszyn, Grabowiec, Zamojski, lubelskie, Polonia, a la edad de 64 años.
